---
title: "Grant Bruer"
image: profile.png
about:
  # id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/grantbruer
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/grantbruer
    - icon: gitlab
      text: Gitlab
      href: https://gitlab.com/grantbruer
repo-actions: true
---

Greetings! I am Grant Bruer.
I like to learn, so I've spent a long time in school.
I enjoy software development, and I am particularly interested in mathematics and physics.
That has led me to a computational science degree from Georgia Tech.

In the [Projects](projects) tab, I have a brief description of past projects I've worked on.

In the [Publications](publications) tab, I have a list of publications on which I am a co-author.
